steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Engie Brasil Energia Dec 2024
from decimal import Decimal
# Provided values
assets = 50112301000.0
current_assets = 7198390000.0
cash = 3958758000.0
receivables = 1174405000.0
noncurrent_assets = 42913911000.0
investments = 1250625000.0
imobilizado = 25186537000.0
intangivel = 5088963000.0

# liabilities
total_liabilities = 50112301000.0
current_liabilities = 7273026000.0
fornecedores = 1099881000.0
current_debt = 2610790000.0
noncurrent_debt = 21036859000.0
other_noncurrent = 6172259000.0
minority = 1013697000.0

# equity
equity_consolidated = 12280398000.0
equity_parent = 11266701000.0

# income statement annual
revenue_12 = 11218635000.0
cogs = -5112053000.0
gross_profit = 6106582000.0
operating_income = 1575469000.0
equity_income = 714115000.0
EBIT_12 = 7682051000.0
financial_result = -1976080000.0
profit_before_tax = 5705971000.0
income_tax = -1403130000.0
net_income = 4302841000.0
net_income_parent = 4279349000.0

# depreciation
depr = 1072024000.0

# previous quarter YTD (to 2024-09-30) from Q3 table
revenue_ytd_sep = 7947729000.0
EBIT_ytd_sep = 5996781000.0
net_income_ytd_sep = 3213097000.0

# shares and price
shares = 815927740
price = 39.29

# Calculations
debt_gross = current_debt + noncurrent_debt
debt_net = debt_gross - cash
market_cap = shares * price
EV = market_cap + debt_net + minority

# Quarterly (3 months) = full year - ytd Sep
revenue_q = revenue_12 - revenue_ytd_sep
EBIT_q = EBIT_12 - EBIT_ytd_sep
net_income_q = net_income - net_income_ytd_sep

# Per share
EPS = net_income_parent / shares
EBIT_per_share = EBIT_12 / shares
revenue_per_share = revenue_12 / shares
assets_per_share = assets / shares
cap_giro = current_assets - current_liabilities
atividade_circ_liq = current_assets - cash  # interpretation

# Ratios
PL = price / EPS if EPS!=0 else None
VPA = equity_parent / shares
P_VP = price / VPA if VPA!=0 else None
P_EBIT = price / EBIT_per_share if EBIT_per_share!=0 else None
PSR = price / revenue_per_share if revenue_per_share!=0 else None
P_Ativos = price / assets_per_share if assets_per_share!=0 else None
P_CapGiro = price / (cap_giro / shares) if (cap_giro/ shares)!=0 else None
P_AtivCircLiq = price / (atividade_circ_liq / shares) if (atividade_circ_liq/shares)!=0 else None

EBITDA = EBIT_12 + depr
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA if EBITDA!=0 else None
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT_12 if EBIT_12!=0 else None

# Margins as percent
marg_bruta = gross_profit / revenue_12 * 100
marg_ebit = EBIT_12 / revenue_12 * 100
marg_liq = net_income / revenue_12 * 100

EBIT_over_assets = EBIT_12 / assets * 100

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
ROIC = EBIT_12 / (assets - fornecedores - cash) * 100
# ROE = Lucro Líquido / Patrimônio Líq (parent)
ROE = net_income_parent / equity_parent * 100

# Liquidity current ratio
liq_corr = current_assets / current_liabilities if current_liabilities!=0 else None

divbr_patrim = debt_gross / equity_consolidated if equity_consolidated!=0 else None

giro_ativos = revenue_12 / assets

# Prepare results
results = {
    'Ativo': assets,
    'Disponibilidades': cash,
    'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
    'Dív. Bruta': debt_gross,
    'Dív. Líquida': debt_net,
    'Patrim. Lq': equity_consolidated,
    'Receita La (12 meses)': revenue_12,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': EBIT_12,
    'Lucro Lo (12 meses)': net_income,
    'Receita La (3 meses)': revenue_q,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': EBIT_q,
    'Lucro Lo (3 meses)': net_income_q,
    'P/L': PL,
    'P/VP': P_VP,
    'P/EBIT': P_EBIT,
    'PSR': PSR,
    'P/Ativos': P_Ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': P_CapGiro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': P_AtivCircLiq,
    'EV / EBITDA': EV_EBITDA,
    'EV / EBIT': EV_EBIT,
    'LPA': EPS,
    'VPA': VPA,
    'Marg. Bruta (%)': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT (%)': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. Lida (%)': marg_liq,
    'EBIT / Ativo (%)': EBIT_over_assets,
    'ROIC (%)': ROIC,
    'ROE (%)': ROE,
    'Liquidez Corr': liq_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos,
    'Market Cap': market_cap,
    'EV': EV,
    'EBITDA': EBITDA
}

# Print all nicely
import json
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
